text.title: Hybrid Delivery Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Hybrid Delivery end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: workstream-inventory
step.action: List workstreams; for each, classify predictive/agile + rationale.

step.name: author-handoff-contracts
step.action: For each interface, author contract with inputs/outputs/acceptance/SLA/escalation.

step.name: single-governance-design
step.action: Charter single steering layer; design mode-aware sub-reports.

step.name: dashboard-translation
step.action: Map workstream metrics into common dashboard; document translation rules.
step.decision-gate: If a metric cannot translate, surface as separate column with caveat.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run validator. Publish plan. Schedule first steering.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix violations before publication.
